dialog.stepLabel: Dianran: "That's it! Deconstruct the reality. Use the diversity of hum..."

items.speaker: Dianran
items.text: That's it! Deconstruct the reality. Use the diversity of human minds as the lead. Leverage the collective memory and emotional resonance of humanity to create a surrealistic rendition of reality.

items.speaker: Dianran
items.text: Well, I don't understand a word of what's coming out of my mouth. I visited the exhibitions of other renowned artists. People there all talked like this.

items.speaker: Dianran
items.text: Maybe that's what I've been missing. Don't laugh. When I say these things, I immediately feel like I'm part of the contemporary art world.
Dianran quickly completes the painting with a few whimsical strokes.
